DEFAULT.msg: An error occurred while processing your request.

UNKNOWN_ERROR:.msg: An error occurred while processing your request.

INVALID_REQUEST.msg: Invalid data submitted to the trading platform.

NOT_ENOUGH_RIGHTS.msg: Unable to connect to the trading platform due to insufficient rights.

CH_BROKER_NOT_FOUND.msg: Unable to perform request due to the invalid broker.

REQUEST_FREQUENCY_EXCEEDED.msg: Velocity of requests is too high.

TRADER_NOT_FOUND.msg: Unable to perform request due to the invalid account data.

CH_PLANT_INVALID.msg: Unable to perform request due invalid plant setting.

NOT_ENOUGH_MONEY.msg: Unable to process request due to insufficient balance.

CHANGE_BALANCE_BAD_AMOUNT.msg: The amount for the requested balance operation is not valid.

TRADER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND.msg: Unable to perform request due invalid user group.

CID_DEFAULT_REGION_NOT_FOUND.msg: Unable to process request, region not found.

CH_CTID_ALREADY_CONFIRMED.msg: Unable to process request, ctid already confirmed.

CANT_ROUTE_REQUEST.msg: Unable to perform request due invalid route.

INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS.msg: Unable to perform request due to insufficient permissions.

CH_CTID_TRADER_ACCOUNT_ALREADY_EXISTS.msg: Unable to process request due to account already existing.

CH_TRADER_ACCOUNT_CANNOT_BE_LINKED.msg: Unable to process request, account cannot be linked.

CH_TRADER_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.msg: Unable to process request due to invalid account.

CH_CTID_TRADER_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.msg: Unable to process request due to invalid account.
